description: Creates a fragment component inside an existing component folder.

fields.label: Fragment name
fields.description: Used for the fragment folder, file name, component import name, and test names.
fields.hint: Use at least two words in kebab-case.

validation.message: Use lowercase kebab-case with at least two words.

fields.label: Category
fields.description: The section containing the parent component.

fields.label: Parent component
fields.description: The existing component folder that should contain this fragment.
fields.hint: Use the parent component folder name in kebab-case.

validation.message: Use lowercase kebab-case with at least two words.

files.output_path: {{ CATEGORY }}/{{ PARENT_COMPONENT | kebab }}/fragments/{{ NAME | kebab }}/{{ NAME | kebab }}.vue
{{ CATEGORY }}/{{ PARENT_COMPONENT | kebab }}/fragments/{{ NAME | kebab }}/{{ NAME | kebab }}.test.js
{{ CATEGORY }}/{{ PARENT_COMPONENT | kebab }}/fragments/{{ NAME | kebab }}/{{ NAME | kebab }}.cy.js
files.label: Cypress component test
